Ausweather

5-DAY SEVERE WEATHER OUTLOOK

Hour-by-hour severe weather risk for Australia — wind, hail, flood and tornado — from the NOAA GFS model, plus a live radar mode and infrared satellite.

Pick a hazard or Max (overall threat). Tap 📡 Radar for the live precipitation loop. The bar under the timeline shows when risk peaks — click it or the day labels to jump. Click the map or a city for a local breakdown.

Shortcuts: Space play · ←/→ step · Home/End first/last frame · R refresh radar · the ◎ button flies to your location.

The ☷ button shows a 5-day hazard summary grid. Day-tick dots below the timeline are colour-coded by peak risk per hazard. The radar loop auto-refreshes every 5 minutes.

Risk levels are computed from model fields and are not official warnings. For authoritative forecasts visit bom.gov.au.

Data: NOAA GFS 2026-07-09 12Z · generated 2026-07-09 18:49 UTC · radar © RainViewer · map © CARTO/OSM/Esri
